title: Why Did the U.S. Allow a Russian Oil Tanker Through Its Cuba Blockade?
summary_full: The ship’s arrival would bring Cuba some badly needed fuel. It also marks a shift from U.S. efforts to block oil shipments and pressure the Cuban government.
summary_public: The ship’s arrival would bring Cuba some badly needed fuel. It also marks a shift from U.S. efforts to block oil shipments and pressure the Cuban government.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: a Russian Oil Tanker Through Its Cuba Blockade
